goals: add unit tests and e2e tests
title: Add a Full Testing Suite to Your Next.js App
description: Layer unit tests, E2E tests, and visual component tests onto an existing Next.js project, then wire them all into CI.

steps.description: Add unit and integration tests with Vitest — fast, TypeScript-native, and compatible with React Testing Library
Add end-to-end tests with Playwright — browser automation for critical user flows
Add Storybook for isolated component development and visual regression testing
Wire all three test suites (Vitest, Playwright, Storybook) into the CI pipeline so every PR is gated on green tests
